name: ai-commit-message-generator
description: Generate conventional commit messages from a selected or staged git diff.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.apiKey.markdownDescription: OpenAI API key used to generate commit messages.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.provider.markdownDescription: AI provider used for commit message generation.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.model.markdownDescription: OpenAI model used for commit message generation.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.ollamaModel.markdownDescription: Ollama model used when the provider is set to ollama.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.ollamaBaseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL for the local Ollama server.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.useSelectionFir.markdownDescription: Use the active editor selection before falling back to the staged diff.
